I'm Tyrelm — producer, artist, and founder of Tyrelm Nation. I help you go from idea to finished record, without the overcomplicated process or inflated prices.

Book a Session See What I Do

Why I Started This

Talented People Deserve a Real Shot

I kept seeing artists with real ideas and real talent who couldn't get the support they needed — either it was too expensive, too complicated, or they just didn't know where to start.

I wanted to change that. Tyrelm Nation is built around one thing: helping you actually get your music made. No unnecessary steps. No over-inflated prices. Just real creative work done right.

Whether you're recording your first song, finishing an EP you've been sitting on, or scoring a short film — I'm here to help you get it done.

"
I don't just press record and walk away. I sit in the room with you and help you get a great performance.

That's the difference. I'm a producer and a collaborator — someone invested in the outcome, not just the invoice. From the first note to the final master, we figure it out together.

What I Can
Help You With

Everything from a single beat to a full album rollout — built around your sound.

🎛️

Beats & Production

Custom beats built around your sound — not whatever's trending. Exclusive or lease options available.

  • Custom beat production
  • Beat leasing & exclusives
  • Song arrangement & composition
  • Instrumentals for brands & creators
🎙️

Recording Sessions

I'll sit in the room and actually help you get a good performance — with real direction, not just a recording light.

  • Vocal recording sessions
  • In-session artist direction
  • Recording setup support
🎚️

Mixing & Mastering

Your music, sounding the way it's supposed to — clear, balanced, and ready for streaming platforms.

  • Full mixing for clarity & punch
  • Mastering for Spotify, Apple, YouTube
  • Vocal tuning & sound cleanup
  • Fixes for rough or unfinished mixes
🎬

Film & Soundtrack

I write and produce music that actually serves the scene — not just audio dropped behind video.

  • Original scores & background music
  • Sound design for storytelling
  • Immersive & ambisonic sound
🎮

Music for Games

Game audio is its own world. From looping tracks to environment design, I'll build audio that fits your game.

  • Loopable game soundtracks
  • Sound effects & transitions
  • Environmental audio design
🧭

Creative Direction

Sometimes you need someone to help you figure out what your project is actually supposed to feel like.

  • Direction for singles, EPs & albums
  • Visuals, branding & presentation
  • Sync licensing preparation
  • Artist connections & collabs

Pricing

Built for Kenya.
Built for You.

I built these prices to work for people here. I don't want cost to be the reason you don't make your music.

Basic

KES 3K – 7K

Good for when you're just starting out or need something simple done right.

  • Beat leasing
  • Short recording session
  • Basic mix
  • WAV or MP3 delivery

Standard

KES 8K – 20K

For artists working on singles who want things done properly.

  • Custom beat production
  • Recording session support
  • Mixing & basic mastering
  • 1–2 revisions included

Full Production

KES 25K – 60K

For serious projects where you need everything handled well.

  • Full song production
  • Recording with direction
  • Professional mix & master
  • Creative direction support
  • Stems available on request

Large Projects

KES 70K+

Albums, EPs, film scores, major creative projects. We'll build a plan together.

  • Full project production
  • Sound design & creative direction
  • Sync-ready mastering
  • Ongoing project support

Prices shift depending on scope and time. If something doesn't quite fit your situation — just reach out. We'll figure out something that works.

How We Work

No Surprises.
Just Results.

Simple, transparent, and built around you. From first conversation to final files — here's how we get it done.

01

We Talk About What You're Making

Tell me your idea — even if it's rough. I'll tell you honestly what it would take.

02

We Agree on Scope & Price

No hidden costs, no surprises. 50% upfront to get started. 50% when we're done and you're happy.

03

We Get to Work

I'm in the room with you — producing, directing, and making adjustments the whole way through.

04

Final Files, Your Way

WAV, MP3, stems — whatever format makes sense for your use. Delivered once everything is approved.

Got a Project in Mind?
Let's Make It Real.

Even a rough idea is enough to start. Reach out and I'll tell you exactly how I can help.
